response.global_summary: The video features a live performance by the virtual YouTuber Kazama Iroha singing her original song 'Entropy of wind direction' (風向きのハルシオン, often referred to as 'Entropy of wind direction' or simply by its Japanese title). She performs the entire song on a stage with a virtual audience.

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha stands on a brightly lit virtual stage with a large screen in the background, performing the song 'Entropy of wind direction'. She is wearing her signature outfit, and the stage is decorated with geometric patterns and lights.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ねえ いつからそこにあったの？
あまりにも近くて気づかなかったよ
ずっと私が生まれた日から
そばにいてくれたのにね
曖昧で複雑で 予測不可能で
気まぐれに変わってゆく空の模様
想像していたようにうまく笑えない
だけどそれ以上に世界は優しくて
いつか風が生まれた足跡が始まる場所
あの頃に戻って帰って
駆けだしたとしたって
ここに来るんだろう
この景色も この声も
私を彩るすべて
方向なんてまだわからないけど
ただ風の吹くままに

ねえ いつから気づいてたの？
まるで私のこと全部を見通しで
苦し紛れに誤魔化した嘘も
君にはバレていたのかな
平凡で退屈で あくびばかりで
変哲のないありふれてる時間
想像しているだけじゃ何も変わらない
だけどそれ以上に 予測してた以上に
ほら 新しい風が吹いてきて
不器用な自分がやけに愛おしく思えたんだ
ハッ

いつか風が止んで足跡が途切れた場所
落とし物探して拾って見つけ出せたから
ここにいるんだろう
そっと、髪がなびく
いつか風が夢見た青空と交わる場所
回り道選んで迷って
つまずいたとしたって
そこへ行くんだろう
この景色も この声も
私を彩るすべて
等身大の手で握りしめて
想像以上に もっと自由な速度で
方向なんてまだわからないけど
ただ風の吹くままに
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, when did it appear there?
It was so close I didn't notice
Even though it was by my side from the day I was born
Ambiguous, complicated, unpredictable, and fickle
The shifting pattern of the sky
I can't smile as well as I imagined
But more than that, the world is kind
Someday, the place where the wind was born and the footprints begin
Even if I returned to that time and started running
I'd probably end up here anyway
This scenery, this voice, everything that colors me
I don't know the direction yet
But just as the wind blows

Hey, when did you notice?
As if you could see through everything about me
I wonder if the lies I made up in my desperation
Were transparent to you too
Ordinary, boring, just yawning, plain, and commonplace time
Just imagining it won't change anything
But more than that, more than I predicted
Look, a new wind has started to blow
I found myself strangely dear in my clumsiness
Ha-ah

Someday, the place where the wind stopped and the footprints broke off
I found the lost item, picked it up, and found it
That's why I'm here
Softly, my hair flutters
Someday, the place where the wind intersects with the blue sky I dreamed of
Even if I chose a detour, got lost, and stumbled
I'd probably go there anyway
This scenery, this voice, everything that colors me
Clutching it with my own hands as they are
At a speed freer than I imagined
I don't know the direction yet
But just as the wind blows
